original_statement: how many sites were listed in 1980?
mutated_statement: how many things were noted in 1980?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Verb generalization + Specificity reduction: "sites" → "things" (concrete/domain-specific → generic/vague) | "listed" → "noted" (formal/specific listing → more general/less specific noting) (how many sites were listed in 1980? → how many things were noted in 1980?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的内容（“Scanning the 'date listed' column... These total 11 entries, matching the Prediction Answer.” 以及列出具体日期和行号的解释），Agent直接按自己的理解对表格中1980年的条目进行逐行计数并给出具体答案11。日志中没有任何提及问题模糊、不确定或请求澄清的语言，也未表达对“sites”和“things”间语义差异的顾虑。因此Agent表现为未意识到原问题在实体和动词层面的泛化导致目标模糊，直接把变异问题当作明确可计数的问题处理，故归为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
